title: manulea flanaganii
intro: Manulea flanaganii is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the borage family. The plant is traditionally used in South African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating menstrual cramps, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Manulea flanaganii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
